/usr/bin/ar qc ../../lib/libB2bLib.a  CMakeFiles/B2bLib.dir/convgpx.c.o CMakeFiles/B2bLib.dir/convbin.c.o CMakeFiles/B2bLib.dir/convkml.c.o CMakeFiles/B2bLib.dir/convrnx.c.o
